phrases.translation: Torture methods applied to physical human bodies
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention III, Art. 17 / Rome Statute Art. 7

phrases.translation: Overwhelming lethal bombardment of physical infrastructure and human bodies to cause psychological paralysis
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Prohibition of Terror Against Civilians

phrases.translation: Mass termination of employment contracts — physical persons losing income and livelihood
Cuts to public services affecting the physical survival conditions of the poorest — food, housing, healthcare
phrases.legalRef: UDHR Art. 25 — Right to Adequate Standard of Living

phrases.translation: Civilian casualties — physical bodies of non-combatants killed or wounded
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Protection of the Civilian Population

phrases.translation: Forced displacement of physical human beings from their homes and land
phrases.legalRef: Rome Statute Art. 7 — Crimes Against Humanity / UDHR Art. 13

phrases.translation: Planned mass layoffs reframed as structural optimisation
Targeted physical destruction — killing or demolition framed as precise
phrases.legalRef: Geneva Convention AP I, Art. 51 — Principle of Distinction

phrases.translation: Job losses — physical persons stripped of income and workplace
Forced deportation of physical persons — removal from country using bureaucratic framing
Physical military force — killing and destruction
Military force justified by humanitarian claims — still involves physical destruction and civilian casualties
Government spending cuts reducing physical access to healthcare, housing and food for vulnerable populations
Forcible replacement of a government — typically involving physical violence and civilian displacement
phrases.legalRef: UN Charter Art. 2(4) — Non-interference in Sovereign States / Rome Statute

phrases.translation: Financial mechanism that permits continued pollution by purchasing credits rather than reducing physical emissions
